mentions.note: Down despite Middle East war turmoil because speculators liquidating to raise SpaceX IPO cash, not true hedging demand.
Hedge failing as speculators liquidate for SpaceX deal funding. War in Middle East not supporting gold; speculation overpowers safe-haven demand. Owners raising cash, not holding for protection.
Down sharply despite geopolitical tensions (Iran war) because speculators liquidating hedges for IPO cash. Shows speculator capitulation, not flight-to-safety demand.
Gold bullion ETF option for portfolio diversification and hedge alongside equity holdings for younger investors.
Up 127% since end 2023 but trading as speculative asset not hedge; plunged 14% when stocks fell 8% in March. Take profits; seasonal pattern suggests summer decline.
Long-time gold bug; up to 10% allocation appropriate as hedge; turned out to be better than stocks lately; anything more is oversized bet.
Gold rallied to multi-decade trend line at $5,100; volatility at highest since financial crisis; RSI in mid-90s; Garner expects sanity-saving correction or blowoff top.
Up 15% YoY on shortage, dollar weakness, geopolitical uncertainty. Own gold, don't trade it.
Simple, low-cost gold ETF; exception to general skepticism toward sector-focused and actively trading ETFs.
